'''Arnoth Draenell''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]] for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] who discovered the [[Bissillirus system/Legends|Bissillirus system]] after his [[Scout ship/Legends|scout ship's]] [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] cut out. While the crew fixed the hyperdrive, Draenall mapped the system, including all five [[Planet/Legends|planets]] and noted that it would serve well as a resupply stop for the newly established [[Terr'skiar Pass]]. Draenall's expedition was cut short when the crew made first contact with the xenophobic [[Inchichtok]] [[Species/Legends|species]] after leaving the system.
